columns.name: Id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the audit event.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: Human-readable name of the event type.

columns.name: Created
columns.description: UTC timestamp when the event was created in SailPoint.

columns.name: Action
columns.description: Action performed during the event (e.g., USER_STEP_UP_AUTH).

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: High-level event type category (e.g., USER_MANAGEMENT, AUTH). Maps from API field 'type'; renamed to avoid conflict with the Azure Monitor reserved 'Type' system column.

columns.name: TechnicalName
columns.description: Technical name identifying the specific event subtype (e.g., USER_AUTHENTICATION_STEP_UP_SETUP_PASSED).

columns.name: Operation
columns.description: Operation performed during the event.

columns.name: Status
columns.description: Outcome status of the event (e.g., PASSED, FAILED).

columns.name: ActorName
columns.description: Name of the actor that triggered the event.

columns.name: TargetName
columns.description: Name of the target object affected by the event.

columns.name: Org
columns.description: SailPoint tenant/org identifier.

columns.name: Pod
columns.description: SailPoint infrastructure pod where the event originated.

columns.name: Stack
columns.description: Stack or service layer where the event originated.

columns.name: AttributesOperation
columns.description: Operation type within the event attributes (e.g., for aggregation events).

columns.name: AttributesProcessId
columns.description: Process ID of the aggregation job.

columns.name: AttributesDuration
columns.description: Duration of the aggregation process.

columns.name: AttributesIdentitiesProcessed
columns.description: Number of identities processed during aggregation.

columns.name: AttributesIdentitiesTotal
columns.description: Total number of identities in the aggregation.

columns.name: AttributesIdentitiesSelected
columns.description: Number of identities selected during aggregation.

columns.name: AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenBefore
columns.description: Groups delta token before aggregation.

columns.name: AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenAfter
columns.description: Groups delta token after aggregation.

columns.name: AttributesHostName
columns.description: Host name associated with the event.

columns.name: AttributesUserId
columns.description: User ID associated with the event.

columns.name: AttributesScope
columns.description: Scope of the event action.

columns.name: AttributesSourceId
columns.description: Source ID associated with the event.

columns.name: AttributesUserDeltaTokenAfter
columns.description: User delta token after aggregation.

columns.name: AttributesUserDeltaTokenBefore
columns.description: User delta token before aggregation.

columns.name: AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenAfter
columns.description: Directory roles delta token after aggregation.

columns.name: AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenBefore
columns.description: Directory roles delta token before aggregation.

columns.name: AttributesAggregationId
columns.description: Aggregation job ID.

columns.name: AttributesSourceName
columns.description: Source name associated with the event.

columns.name: AttributesCapability
columns.description: Capability associated with the event.

columns.name: Objects
columns.description: Related object names or identifiers involved in the event.

columns.name: Details
columns.description: Additional contextual details about the event.

columns.name: TrackingNumber
columns.description: Tracking number for access request-related events.

columns.name: Synced
columns.description: UTC timestamp when the event was synced to the platform.

columns.name: DocType
columns.description: SailPoint internal Elasticsearch document type (value is always 'event'). Renamed from 'SailPointDocType'; maps from API field '_type'.

columns.name: Index
columns.description: SailPoint internal Elasticsearch index identifier. Renamed from 'SailPointIndex'; maps from API field '_index'.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: Hard-coded source system identifier for backwards compatibility with the Azure Function connector (SailPointIDN_Events_CL). Value is always 'RestAPI'.
